price: und diejenigen, die wegen der Strafe ihres Herrn besorgt sind,
arabic: وَٱلَّذِينَ هُم مِّنۡ عَذَابِ رَبِّهِم مُّشۡفِقُونَ

version.title: German Translation - Bubenheim
version.description: Translation of the Quran meanings into German by Abdullah As-Samit (Frank Bubenheim) and Dr. Nadeem Elyas

meta.transliteration: wa-alladhīna hum min ʿadhābi rabbihim mush'fiqūna
